data.body: Live per-environment signing now validated: (LOCAL) a write with the identity+key configured is signed+attributed to the resolved identity and rebar verify-identity reports it verified (0 bad-signature). (CI/GitHub Actions) after the job-level-env fix (bug ad48/change 681), canary run 29348602347 produced signed event f436-fac8-382f-47ec, verified as bot identity 594c-9dcf-5ad6-4e6d. All 7 child tasks closed. Rebar Bot identity exists with key in the declared SSM param + GH secret. require_authenticated remains False (setup-only scope).
